title: Prioritize Fiscal hawks
rationale: Fiscal hawks has the strongest aggregate score (0.491) with mean confidence 0.431.

title: Use q35a_low_income_programs as a segmentation lever
rationale: Reduce federal funding for programs that help lower income Americans. shows the largest cross-segment divergence (avg JS 0.000).

title: Track route reliability in pilot delivery
rationale: Fallbacks were triggered in 100.0% of question predictions, so project logs and retry monitoring should stay on.

title: Treat close calls as validation candidates
rationale: Higher-uncertainty or unstable questions should be converted into focused follow-up tests before committing large spend.
